zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese Peveral於1104年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾時，她的父親Robert Peverell25歲，母親Adelicia de Verdun39歲。她和Ivo d'Harcourt至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1185年在英國坎布利其爾布享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peveral
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

variants.name: Palethorpe
meanings: English: locative name from Perlethorpe (Notts), which is recorded as Torp in 1086, Peuereltorp in 1194, and Palethorpe al. Peverillthorp in 1650. The place-name derives from Old English or Old Scandinavian þorp ‘secondary settlement, outlying farm’. It appears that the surname Peverall was prefixed to the place-name, but it is not clear why.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese Peveral was born in 1104, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Peverell, was 25 and her mother, Adelicia de Verdun, was 39. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Ivo d'Harcourt. She died about 1185, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese Peveral est née en 1104, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Peverell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adelicia de Verdun, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Ivo d'Harcourt. Elle est décédée environ 1185, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

Sie hatte mit Ivo d'Harcourt mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1185 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Ivo d'Harcourt. Morì circa 1185, nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese Peveralが1104年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Peverellは25歳，母Adelicia de Verdunは39歳であった。彼女はIvo d'Harcourtとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1185年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese Peveral(이)가 1104년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Peverell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelicia de Verdun(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Ivo d'Harcourt(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 영국 캄브리지실르 부른에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese Peveral родилась в 1104 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Peverell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelicia de Verdun, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Ivo d'Harcourt. Она умерла около 1185 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.
